Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Mapping cylinder in C(A) *)
(** ** Introduction
- Mapping cylinder
- Let f : X -> Y be a morphism of complexes, then Y is isomorphic to Cyl(f) in K(A)
*)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.UnivalenceAxiom.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TransportMorphisms.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinDirectSums.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AbelianToAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AdditiveFunctors.

Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.Complexes.
Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.KA.
Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.TranslationFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.HomologicalAlgebra.MappingCone.

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

Local Open Scope hz_scope.
Local Open Scope cat.

Local Opaque hz isdecrelhzeq hzplus iscommringops ZeroArrow.

(** * Mapping cylinder *)
(** ** Introduction
In this section we construct the mapping cylinder, which is a complex, of a morphism f : C_1 -> C_2
of complexes. We denote mapping cylinder of f by Cyl(f). The objects of mapping cylinder are given
by C_1^i ⊕ Cone(f)^i. The ith differential of Cyl(f) is given by
         #  p_1 · d^i_X · i_1 - p_2 · p1 · i_1 + p_2 · d^i_C(f) · i_2 #

Here d^i_C(F) is the ith differential of the mapping cone of f, see section [mapping_cone].
We split the definition of the ith differential into a sum of 3 morphisms. These are constructed in
[MappingCylinderDiff1], [MappingCylinderDiff3], and [MappingCylinderDiff3], and correspond the
morphisms of the above formula, respectively. In [MappingCylinderDiff] we construct the
differential. In [MappingCylinder_comp] we show that composition of two consecutive differentials
is 0. The complex Cyl(f) is constructed in [MappingCylinder].
*)
Section mapping_cylinder.

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.

  (**  # p_1 · d^i_X · i_1 # *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
let DS1' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
    (C2 i) in
let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1' in
let DS2' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1)) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2' in
A ⟦ DS1, DS2 ⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
let DS1' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
    (C2 i) in
let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1' in
let DS2' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1)) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2' in
A ⟦ DS1, DS2 ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1': BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1'
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A
  (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) 
  (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1))
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2': BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS2'
A ⟦ DS1, DS2 ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1': BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1'
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A
  (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) 
  (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1))
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2': BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS2'
A
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
  (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1': BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1'
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A
  (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) 
  (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1))
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2': BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS2'
A ⟦ DS1, ?b ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
  (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1': BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1'
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A
  (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) 
  (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1))
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2': BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS2'
A ⟦ ?b, DS2 ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1': BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1'
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A
  (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) 
  (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1))
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2': BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS2'
A
 exact (C1 i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)

  (C2 (i + 1))
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2': BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS2'
A ⟦ DS1, C1 i ⟧
 exact (to_Pr1 DS1).

C1, C2: Complex A

DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)

C1, C2: Complex A

C1, C2: Complex A

A ⟦ C1 i, C1 (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (Diff C1 i).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)

A ⟦ C1 (i + 1), DS2 ⟧
 exact (to_In1 DS2).
  Defined.

 exact ((TranslationComplex A C1) i).

 exact (to_inv (to_Pr1 DS1')).

C1, C2: Complex A

A ⟦ TranslationComplex A C1 i, DS2 ⟧
 exact (to_In1 DS2).
  Defined.

  (** p_2 · d^i_C(f) · i_2 *)
  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
let DS1' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
    (C2 i) in
let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1' in
let DS2' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1)) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS2' in
A ⟦ DS1, DS2 ⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
let DS1' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
    (C2 i) in
let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1' in
let DS2' :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
    (C2 (i + 1)) in

A ⟦ DS1, DS2 ⟧

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
let DS1 :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i) in
let DS2 :=
  to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
  in
MappingCylinderDiff1 f i
· MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · identity (C1 (i + 1))
· Diff C1 (i + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · Diff C1 (i + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · Diff C1 (i + 1))
· ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
π₁%abgrcat
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 i)
    (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (MappingCone A f i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i)
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
MappingCylinderDiff1 f i
· MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
MappingCylinderDiff1 f i
· MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
· MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
· (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1)))
π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
· to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1)))
π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
· ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 (i + 1))
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
· to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1)))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
· to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1)))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1)))
π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
· (ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
· MappingConeDiff A f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
DS:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1))): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1)))
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1)))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
MappingCylinderDiff f i
· MappingCylinderDiff f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz

· MappingCylinderDiff f (i + 1) =

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (MappingCylinderDiff1 f i)
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff2 f i)
     (MappingCylinderDiff3 f i))
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A
          (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1))))
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A
          (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
    (MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1))
    (to_binop
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
       (MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1))
       (MappingCylinderDiff3 f (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))

          (C2 (i + 1))))

          (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

    (to_binop
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))

C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
D11:= MappingCylinder_Diff1_Diff1 f i: let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i) in
MappingCylinderDiff1 f i · MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
(to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
(to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
(to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
(to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
(C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (MappingCylinderDiff1 f i)
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff2 f i)
     (MappingCylinderDiff3 f i))
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1))))
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
    (MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1))
    (to_binop
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

             (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

       (MappingCylinderDiff3 f (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))

           (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff2 f i)
     (MappingCylinderDiff3 f i))
· to_binop

       (MappingCylinderDiff3 f (i + 1))) =

     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
     (MappingCylinderDiff1 f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1))

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))

        (MappingCylinderDiff2 f i
         · MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1))

         · MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1))))

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
              (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

         · MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1))

           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
                 (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
           (MappingCylinderDiff2 f i
            · MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1))

            · MappingCylinderDiff2 f (i + 1))))
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
              (C2 (i + 1))))
        (MappingCylinderDiff1 f i)
        (to_binop

              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
                 (C2 (i + 1))))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
D11:= MappingCylinder_Diff1_Diff1 f i: let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) (MappingCone A f i) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (MappingCone A f i) in
MappingCylinderDiff1 f i · MappingCylinderDiff1 f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
(to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
(to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
(to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
(to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
(C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

(to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
(C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

(to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
(C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

           (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

                 (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

            · MappingCylinderDiff3 f (i + 1))))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))

DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1' (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i · π₁%abgrcat)
· ι₁%abgrcat =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1' (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
· ι₁%abgrcat

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz

DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1

  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))

to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
     (MappingConeDiff1 A f i)
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1))) (MappingConeDiff2 A f i)
        (MappingConeDiff3 A f i)) · π₁%abgrcat) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))

i: pr1 hz

      · (to_inv (Diff C1 (i + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
      · ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS1 DS3
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat))
      · π₁%abgrcat)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1)))
     (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)
         · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 (i + 1))
             (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
        (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i
         · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 (i + 1))
             (C1 (i + 1 + 1))))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

f: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz

DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1)))
     (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1
           (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
        (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i
         · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 (i + 1))
             (C1 (i + 1 + 1))))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))

DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1)))
     (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1
           (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))
        (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1
           (C1 (i + 1 + 1))))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

i: pr1 hz

DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1)))
     (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1
        (C1 (i + 1 + 1)))) =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 (i + 1))) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: pr1 hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS1':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 + 1))
DS2':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) DS2
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS3':= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 (i + 1 + 1))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

f: Morphism C1 C2

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
?D' i · ?D' (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (?D i) (?D (i + 1 + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A
 exact (to_BinDirectSums
                         A (C1 i) (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i))).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
A
⟦ (λ i0 : hz,
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i0)
        (C2 i0))) i,
(λ i0 : hz,
 to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
   (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i0)
      (C2 i0))) (i + 1) ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
A
⟦ (λ i : hz,
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i))) i,
(λ i : hz,
 to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
   (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
      (C2 i))) (i + 1) ⟧
 exact (MappingCylinderDiff f i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, MappingCylinderDiff f i0) i
· (λ i0 : hz, MappingCylinderDiff f i0) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
      (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i0)
         (C2 i0))) i)
  ((λ i0 : hz,
    to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
      (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i0)
         (C2 i0))) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
(λ i : hz, MappingCylinderDiff f i) i
· (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderDiff f i) (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  ((λ i : hz,
    to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
      (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
         (C2 i))) i)
  ((λ i : hz,
    to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
      (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
         (C2 i))) (i + 1 + 1))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: Morphism C1 C2
i: hz
MappingCylinderDiff f i
· MappingCylinderDiff f (i + 1) =
ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1 + 1))
        (C2 (i + 1 + 1))))
 exact (MappingCylinder_comp f i).
  Defined.

End mapping_cylinder.


(** * Let f : X -> Y, then Y is isomorphic to Cyl(f) in K(A) *)
(** ** Introduction
We show that in K(A) Y and Cyl(f) are isomorphic. The isomorphism is given by the morphisms
α := i_2 · i_2 and β := p_1 · f + p_2 · p_2. We have α · β = id in C(A), but
β · α ≠ id_{Cyl(f)} in C(A). We define a homotopy by χ^i := p_1 · i_1 · i_2 : Cyl(f)^i -->
Cyl(f)^{i-1}. We show that
       # id_{Cyl(f)} - β · α = χ^i · d^{i-1}_{Cyl(f)} + d^i_{Cyl(f)} · χ^{i-1} #
       $ id_{Cyl(f)} - β · α = χ^i · d^{i-1}_{Cyl(f)} + d^i_{Cyl(f)} · χ^{i-1} $  ( * )
This means that β · α = id_{Cyl(f)} in K(A) by the definition of homotopy of morphisms.
Hence Y and C(f) are isomorphic.

The morphisms α and β are defined in [MappingCylinderMor1_mor] and [MappingCylinderMor2_mor].
The equality α · β = id is proven in [MappingCylinderIso_eq1]. The homotopy χ is constructed
in [MappingCylinderIsoHomot]. The equality ( * ) is proven in 4 steps. These steps are
[MappingCylinderIsoHomot_eq1], [MappingCylinderIsoHomot_eq2], [MappingCylinderIsoHomot_eq3],
and [MappingCylinderIsoHomot_eq4]. The equality β · α = id is proved in [MappingCylinderIso_eq2].
The fact that Y and Cyl(f) are isomorphic in K(A) is proved in [MappingCylinderIso].
*)
Section mapping_cylinder_KA_iso.

  Variable A : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure.


  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ C2 i, MappingCylinder A f i ⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ C2 i, MappingCylinder A f i ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ C2 i,
make_Complex A
  (λ i : hz,
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i))) (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderDiff A f i)
  (λ i : hz, MappingCylinder_comp A f i) i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ C2 i,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)) ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
A ⟦ C2 i, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1 ⟧

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
A ⟦ C2 i, DS2 ⟧

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

A
 exact DS1.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
A ⟦ C2 i, DS1 ⟧
 use (to_In2 DS1).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
A ⟦ DS1, DS2 ⟧
 use (to_In2 DS2).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i
· Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i =
Diff C2 i · MappingCylinderMor1_mor f (i + 1)

Diff C2 i · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · MappingCylinderDiff A f i =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
          (C2 i)))
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A
          (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff1 A f i)
    (to_binop
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f i)
       (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i)) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
          (C2 i)))
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A
          (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1))))
    (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
    (to_binop
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f i)
       (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i)) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
          (C2 i)))
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A
          (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1))))
    (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
    (to_binop
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
       (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i)) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)

    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))

          (to_BinDirectSums A
             (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat
        · (MappingConeDiff A f i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))

       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i + 1))))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat
        · (MappingConeDiff A f i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop DS2 DS4
    (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
    (to_binop DS2 DS4
       (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat

Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop (C2 i) DS4
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop (C2 i) DS4
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
   · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

  (ι₂%abgrcat · (ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat)
   · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
   · to_binop DS2 DS4
       (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat
        · (MappingConeDiff A f i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop (C2 i) DS4
  (ι₂%abgrcat
   · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 i)
   · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
   · to_binop DS2 DS4
       (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat
        · (MappingConeDiff A f i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

to_binop (C2 i) DS4

   · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

       (π₂%abgrcat

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop DS1 DS3
    (π₁%abgrcat
     · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
    (to_binop DS1 DS3
       (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop (C2 i) DS3
  (ι₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat
      · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)))
  (ι₂%abgrcat
   · to_binop DS1 DS3
       (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop (C2 i) DS3
  (ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
   · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₂%abgrcat
   · to_binop DS1 DS3
       (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop (C2 i) DS3
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (C1 (i + 1))
   · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (ι₂%abgrcat
   · to_binop DS1 DS3
       (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
       (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat

to_binop (C2 i) DS3

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
identity (C2 i) · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat) =
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat = Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A C2,
ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f) ⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A C2,
ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f) ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
Morphism C2 (MappingCylinder A f)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C2 i, MappingCylinder A f i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i =
Diff C2 i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ C2 i, MappingCylinder A f i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ C2 i, MappingCylinder A f i ⟧
 exact (MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i0) i
· Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i =
Diff C2 i
· (λ i0 : hz, MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i0) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
(λ i : hz, MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i) i
· Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i =
Diff C2 i
· (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i) (i + 1)
 exact (MappingCylinderMor1_comm f i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, C2 i ⟧

A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, C2 i ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A
⟦ make_Complex A
    (λ i : hz,
     to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
          (C2 i)))
    (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderDiff A f i)
    (λ i : hz, MappingCylinder_comp A f i) i, C2 i ⟧

C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A
⟦ to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)), C2 i ⟧

A
 exact (C1 i).

A ⟦ DS2, C1 i ⟧
 use (to_Pr1 DS2).

i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
A ⟦ DS1, C2 i ⟧
 use (to_Pr2 DS1).

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i
· MappingCylinderMor2_mor f (i + 1)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i
· MappingCylinderMor2_mor f (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))) (C2 i)
  (π₁%abgrcat · f i) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
· Diff C2 i =
Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1)))) (C2 (i + 1))
    (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))) (C2 i)
  (π₁%abgrcat · f i) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
· Diff C2 i =
MappingCylinderDiff A f i
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1)))) (C2 (i + 1))
    (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1) (C2 i)
  (π₁%abgrcat · f i) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
· Diff C2 i =
MappingCylinderDiff A f i
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1)))) (C2 (i + 1))
    (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)

  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =
MappingCylinderDiff A f i
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
          (C2 (i + 1)))) (C2 (i + 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =
MappingCylinderDiff A f i
· to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3)
    (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =
MappingCylinderDiff A f i
· to_binop DS4 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (MappingCylinderDiff1 A f i)
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f i)
     (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i))
· to_binop DS4 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f i)
     (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i))
· to_binop DS4 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A

i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
     (to_BinDirectSums A
        (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))))
  (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1))))
     (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
     (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i))
· to_binop DS4 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · Diff C2 i =

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

        (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))

     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A
           (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1))))
     (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
     (π₂%abgrcat
      · (MappingConeDiff A f i · ι₂%abgrcat)))
· to_binop DS4 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A

  (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))

  (π₁%abgrcat · f i · Diff C2 i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i) =
to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))

      · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
         · (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)))
        (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
         · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat

     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · π₂%abgrcat))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · f i · Diff C2 i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i) =
to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C1 (i + 1))
          DS3 · π₂%abgrcat))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))

  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i) =

  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS2
           (C1 (i + 1)) · f (i + 1))
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

  (π₁%abgrcat · f i · Diff C2 i)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i) =
to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 (i + 1))
        (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS2
           (C2 (i + 1)))
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))

π₂%abgrcat
· to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))

π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
     (MappingConeDiff1 A f i)
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1))) (MappingConeDiff2 A f i)
        (MappingConeDiff3 A f i)) · π₂%abgrcat)

  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat))

     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
      · π₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS1 DS3
        (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
        (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat))
      · π₂%abgrcat))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
      · π₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · π₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · π₂%abgrcat)))

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i
      · ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · (f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · π₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · π₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i
      · ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · (Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · π₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i
      · ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)

         · π₂%abgrcat)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i
      · (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 i
      · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
          (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)))
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C2 (i + 1)))
     (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
        (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat
         · π₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1) · identity (C2 (i + 1)))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i · identity (C2 (i + 1))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1)) (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)))
     (π₁%abgrcat · f (i + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i =
to_binop DS1 (C2 (i + 1))
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C2 (i + 1)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i = π₂%abgrcat · Diff C2 i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive A
⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f),
ComplexHomotFunctor A C2 ⟧

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexPreCat_Additive A
⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f),
ComplexHomotFunctor A C2 ⟧

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
Morphism (MappingCylinder A f) C2
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, C2 i ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
?Mors i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i · ?Mors (i + 1)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz, A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, C2 i ⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, C2 i ⟧
 exact (MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
(λ i0 : hz, MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i0) i
· Diff C2 i =
Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i
· (λ i0 : hz, MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i0) (i + 1)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
(λ i : hz, MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i) i · Diff C2 i =
Diff (MappingCylinder A f) i
· (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i) (i + 1)
 exact (MappingCylinderMor2_comm f i).
  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
MappingCylinderMor1 f · MappingCylinderMor2 f =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
MappingCylinderMor1 f · MappingCylinderMor2 f =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
(MappingCylinderMor1 f · MappingCylinderMor2 f) i =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
(MappingCylinderMor1 f · MappingCylinderMor2 f) i =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i
· MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i = identity (C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i =
identity (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
    (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) = identity (C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
    (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) = identity (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1) (C2 i)
    (π₁%abgrcat · f i) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) =
identity (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
· to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
    (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) = identity (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop (C2 i) (C2 i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₁%abgrcat · f i))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)) =
identity (C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop (C2 i) (C2 i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · f i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)) =
identity (C2 i)
