f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop (C2 i) (C2 i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · (ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat) · f i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)) =
identity (C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop (C2 i) (C2 i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat
   · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS1 (C1 i) · f i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)) =
identity (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop (C2 i) (C2 i)
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (C1 i) · f i)
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)) =
identity (C2 i)

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop (C2 i) (C2 i)
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) (C2 i) (C2 i))
  (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)) =
identity (C2 i)

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
ι₂%abgrcat · (ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat) · π₂%abgrcat =
identity (C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
ι₂%abgrcat · identity DS1 · π₂%abgrcat =
identity (C2 i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat = identity (C2 i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
identity (C2 i) = identity (C2 i)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (MappingCylinderMor1 f · MappingCylinderMor2 f) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot A (MappingCylinder A f)
  (MappingCylinder A f)

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, MappingCylinder A f (i - 1)
⟧
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A
⟦ make_Complex A
    (λ i : hz,
     to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
       (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
          (C2 i)))
    (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderDiff A f i)
    (λ i : hz, MappingCylinder_comp A f i) i,
make_Complex A
  (λ i : hz,
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (TranslationComplex A C1 i)
        (C2 i))) (λ i : hz, MappingCylinderDiff A f i)
  (λ i : hz, MappingCylinder_comp A f i) (i - 1) ⟧

C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A
⟦ to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)),
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))) ⟧

A ⟦ to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))) ⟧

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
A ⟦ DS2,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))) ⟧

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
A ⟦ DS2, to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3 ⟧

 exact (C1 i).

i: hz

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
A ⟦ DS2, C1 i ⟧
 exact (to_Pr1 DS2).

DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
A ⟦ ?b, DS4 ⟧

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
A
 exact DS3.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
A ⟦ C1 i, DS3 ⟧
 exact (transportf (λ x' : ob A, precategory_morphisms x' DS3)
                          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) (to_In1 DS3)).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
A ⟦ DS3, DS4 ⟧
 exact (to_inv (to_In2 DS4)).
  Defined.

  Defined.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
   · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
   · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
   · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i - 1)))))
    (maponpaths
       (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
        to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
       (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
π₁%abgrcat
· (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
      ⟧) (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat
   · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i - 1)))))
    (maponpaths
       (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
        to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
       (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
π₁%abgrcat
· (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
      ⟧) (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat
   · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i - 1)))))
    (maponpaths
       (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
        to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
       (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv (f i) · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
π₁%abgrcat
· (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
      ⟧) (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat
   · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
· transportf
    (precategory_morphisms
       (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
             (C2 (i - 1)))))
    (maponpaths
       (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
        to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
       (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv (f i) · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))

  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat
· transportf (precategory_morphisms DS3)
    (maponpaths
       (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
        to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
       (hzrminusplus i 1))
    (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
     · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
     (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))

     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5

     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)

     (ι₁%abgrcat

         · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))) =

     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    (* Unfold MappingCylinderDiff *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1))))
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1
                      (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
             (MappingCylinderDiff1 A f (i - 1))
             (to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1))))
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1
                         (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
                (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f (i - 1))
                (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f (i - 1)))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5

  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1))))
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1
                      (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
             (π₁%abgrcat
              · (Diff C1 (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
             (to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1))))
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1
                         (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
                (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f (i - 1))
                (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f (i - 1)))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1))))
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1
                      (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
             (π₁%abgrcat
              · (Diff C1 (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
             (to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1))))
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1
                         (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
                (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f (i - 1)))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

i: hz

DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5

  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1))))
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (TranslationComplex A C1
                      (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))

             (to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1))))
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (TranslationComplex A C1
                         (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1)
                    · ι₂%abgrcat)))))) =

  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1))))
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
             (π₁%abgrcat
              · (Diff C1 (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
             (to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))))
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1 + 1))))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1)
                    · ι₂%abgrcat)))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5

  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop DS4 DS6
             (π₁%abgrcat
              · (Diff C1 (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
             (to_binop DS4 DS6
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1)
                    · ι₂%abgrcat)))))) =

  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1

  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,

     (hzrminusplus i 1))

     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
         · to_binop DS4 DS6
             (π₁%abgrcat
              · (Diff C1 (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
             (to_binop DS4 DS6
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
                (π₂%abgrcat
                 · (MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1)
                    · ι₂%abgrcat)))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat
      · to_binop DS4 DS6
          (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
          (to_binop DS4 DS6
             (π₂%abgrcat
              · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat))
             (π₂%abgrcat
              · (MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1)
                 · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

        (to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

        (to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
        (to_inv
           (ι₁%abgrcat
            · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS3
                (C1 (i - 1))) · Diff C1 (i - 1)
         · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · to_binop DS4 DS6
             (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat)
              · ι₁%abgrcat)
             (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1)
              · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
        (to_inv
           (to_inv
              (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
               · π₁%abgrcat)) · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat) · π₂%abgrcat
         · MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)

               · ι₁%abgrcat)))
        (to_inv

            · MappingConeDiff A f (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
        (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv
           (ι₁%abgrcat
            · to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1)))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1 + 1)))
                (MappingConeDiff1 A f (i - 1))
                (to_binop
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1 + 1)))
                   (MappingConeDiff2 A f (i - 1))
                   (MappingConeDiff3 A f (i - 1)))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1 + 1)))
                (π₁%abgrcat
                 · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1
                      (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))

                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A

                      (C2 (i - 1 + 1)))

  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
        (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv
           (ι₁%abgrcat
            · to_binop
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1)))
                (to_BinDirectSums A
                   (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                   (C2 (i - 1 + 1)))
                (π₁%abgrcat
                 · (DiffTranslationComplex A C1
                      (i - 1) · ι₁%abgrcat))
                (to_binop
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)))
                   (to_BinDirectSums A
                      (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
                      (C2 (i - 1 + 1)))
                   (π₁%abgrcat
                    · (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
                   (MappingConeDiff3 A f (i - 1)))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
                 (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
                  · f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
                 (ι₁%abgrcat
                  · (π₂%abgrcat
                     · (Diff C2 (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
        (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
               · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1)
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
                 (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
                  · f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
                 (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
                  · (Diff C2 (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

        (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
               · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1)
               · ι₁%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5

     (hzrminusplus i 1))

     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
        (identity (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (identity (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · DiffTranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1)
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
                 (identity (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                  · f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
                 (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
                  · Diff C2 (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

                 (identity (C1 (i - 1 + 1))

                  · Diff C2 (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6 ι₁%abgrcat
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1)
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
                 (identity (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                  · f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
                 (ι₁%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
                  · Diff C2 (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6 ι₁%abgrcat
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (DiffTranslationComplex A C1 (i - 1)
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
                 (identity (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
                  · f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
                 (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A)
                    (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
                  · Diff C2 (i - 1) · ι₂%abgrcat))
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6 ι₁%abgrcat
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    (* rewrite transports *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS6
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat)
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_inv
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat)
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (to_binop (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS6
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_binop (C1 i) DS6
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

    (* The first terms of to_binop are equal, cancel them *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat) =
ι₁%abgrcat
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     ι₁%abgrcat) = ι₁%abgrcat
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, ι₁%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp tmp'' (i - 1 + 1) i 
  (hzrminusplus i 1): tmp'' i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (tmp'' (i - 1 + 1)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat) =
ι₁%abgrcat

ι₁%abgrcat

i: hz

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))

A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧

  tmp (λ i0 : hz, ι₁%abgrcat) 
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     ι₁%abgrcat)
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     ι₁%abgrcat) = ι₁%abgrcat
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     ι₁%abgrcat) = ι₁%abgrcat
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2 ι₁%abgrcat
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     ι₁%abgrcat) = ι₁%abgrcat
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1))
               · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
           (maponpaths
              (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
               to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                 (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
              (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)

                    (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))

              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))

        (hzrminusplus i 1))

        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat))
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_inv
  (to_binop (C1 i) DS2
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (to_inv (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₁%abgrcat
            · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
           (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat

    (* The first term of to_binop are equal, cancel them *)

i: hz

  (to_inv
     (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
        (maponpaths
           (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
              (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                 (C2 i0))) (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)

            · ι₂%abgrcat))))
  (to_inv

  (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat

           (f (i - 1 + 1) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS1 (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat

DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, Diff C1 i0 · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, Diff C1 i0 · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp tmp'' (i - 1 + 1) i 
  (hzrminusplus i 1): tmp'' i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (tmp'' (i - 1 + 1)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A

     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)

     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =

C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3

  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, Diff C1 i0 · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧

  tmp
  (λ i0 : hz,
   Diff C1 i0 · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))

     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =

  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
