A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, Diff C1 i0 · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp
  (λ i0 : hz,
   Diff C1 i0 · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
 apply idpath.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop (C1 i) DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
        (Diff C1 (i - 1 + 1) · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    (* Solve the rest *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS6 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

i: hz

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))

i: hz

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz,
to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))

to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz,
to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp tmp'' (i - 1 + 1) i 
  (hzrminusplus i 1): tmp'' i =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (tmp'' (i - 1 + 1)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz,
to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp
  (λ i0 : hz,
   to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz,
to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp
  (λ i0 : hz,
   to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i - 1 + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i - 1 + 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i - 1 + 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz,
to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 i0,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A C1
  tmp
  (λ i0 : hz,
   to_inv (f i0) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (i - 1 + 1) i (hzrminusplus i 1): to_inv (f i) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i - 1 + 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 i))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrminusplus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A,
      A ⟦ x,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i - 1 + 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i - 1 + 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (to_inv (f (i - 1 + 1)) · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
A ⟦ MappingCylinder A f i, MappingCylinder A f i ⟧

    (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)),

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
   · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
   · (π₁%abgrcat
      · (transportf
           (λ x' : A,
            A ⟦ x',
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
              (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
   · (π₁%abgrcat
      · (transportf
           (λ x' : A,
            A ⟦ x',
            to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
              (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (to_inv (Diff C1 i) · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))

  (maponpaths

              (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)

           ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (to_inv (Diff C1 i) · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
   · (π₁%abgrcat
      · (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
           (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
           ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (to_inv (Diff C1 i) · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))

     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,

           (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1)))) (MappingCylinderDiff1 A f i)

           (to_BinDirectSums A
              (TranslationComplex A C1 i) (C2 i)))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1))
           (to_BinDirectSums A
              (TranslationComplex A C1 (i + 1))
              (C2 (i + 1))))
        (MappingCylinderDiff2 A f i)
        (MappingCylinderDiff3 A f i))
   · (π₁%abgrcat

           ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat

DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (to_binop DS2 DS6
     (π₁%abgrcat · (Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
      · (π₁%abgrcat
         · (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
              ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (to_binop DS2 DS6
        (π₂%abgrcat · (to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
         · (π₁%abgrcat
            · (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
                 (maponpaths C1
                    (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
                 ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (π₂%abgrcat
         · (MappingConeDiff A f i · ι₂%abgrcat)
         · (π₁%abgrcat
            · (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
                 (maponpaths C1
                    (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
                 ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (to_inv (Diff C1 i) · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))

         · π₁%abgrcat
         · (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
              (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
              ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat
   · (to_inv (Diff C1 i) · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat
   · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))

i: hz

DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5

     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))

        (hzrplusminus i 1))

             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)

         · π₁%abgrcat

             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat

           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_binop DS2 DS6
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · π₁%abgrcat
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_binop DS2 DS6
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
         · (ι₁%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat)
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_binop DS2 DS6
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
         · identity (C1 (i + 1))
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ι₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (to_binop DS2 DS6
        (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · MappingConeDiff A f i
         · ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS3
             (C1 (i + 1))
         · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
             (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
             ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

    (* The first terms of to_binop are equal, cancel them *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
   · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
       ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
· ι₂%abgrcat
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
   · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
       ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
· ι₂%abgrcat
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)

  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,

     (to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat): ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 (i0 + 1),
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A
  (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1)) tmp tmp'' 
  (i + 1 - 1) i (hzrplusminus i 1): tmp'' i =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     ((λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1)) i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
        (hzrplusminus i 1)) 
     (tmp'' (i + 1 - 1)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1 - 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     (to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_inv (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

i: hz

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))

     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))

DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 =
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1) (hzrplusminus i 1)
 apply isasethz.
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e2: maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
  (hzrplusminus i 1)
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
     (hzrplusminus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e2: maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
  (hzrplusminus i 1)
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) ι₁%abgrcat =

  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
   · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
       ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
· ι₂%abgrcat
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

       ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat

  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)

          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
   · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e1: transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
   · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
       ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
· ι₂%abgrcat
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)

        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i
      · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
          (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
          ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
   · transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
       (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
       ι₁%abgrcat · to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    (* Use similar technique as above *)
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
· transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
    (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
    ι₁%abgrcat
· transportf (precategory_morphisms DS5)
    (maponpaths
       (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
        to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
          (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
       (hzrplusminus i 1)) (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat) =
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
π₂%abgrcat · to_inv π₁%abgrcat
· (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     ι₁%abgrcat
   · transportf (precategory_morphisms DS5)
       (maponpaths
          (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
           to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
             (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
          (hzrplusminus i 1)) (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat)) =
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
π₂%abgrcat
· (to_inv π₁%abgrcat
   · (transportf (λ x' : A, A ⟦ x', DS5 ⟧)
        (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
        ι₁%abgrcat
      · transportf (precategory_morphisms DS5)
          (maponpaths
             (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
              to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
                (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1))
                   (C2 i0))) (hzrplusminus i 1))
          (to_inv ι₂%abgrcat))) =
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 (i0 + 1),
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1 - 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
tmp:= λ i0 : hz,
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)): hz → A
tmp'':= λ i0 : hz, ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat: ∏ i0 : hz,
A ⟦ C1 (i0 + 1),
to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)) ⟧
tmp':= transport_hz_double_section_source_target A
  (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1)) tmp tmp'' 
  (i + 1 - 1) i (hzrplusminus i 1): tmp'' i =
transportf
  (precategory_morphisms
     ((λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1)) i))
  (maponpaths tmp (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x : A, A ⟦ x, tmp (i + 1 - 1) ⟧)
     (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
        (hzrplusminus i 1)) 
     (tmp'' (i + 1 - 1)))
transportf (precategory_morphisms (C1 (i + 1)))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
     (hzrplusminus i 1))
  (transportf
     (λ x' : A,
      A ⟦ x',
      to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
           (C2 (i + 1 - 1))) ⟧)
     (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1))
     (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat

i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
     (hzrplusminus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))

  (idpath (i + 1 - 1)) =
maponpaths C1
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1) (idpath (i + 1 - 1)))
 apply idpath.

DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3

  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1 =
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, i0 + 1) (hzrplusminus i 1)
 apply isasethz.
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e2: maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
  (hzrplusminus i 1)
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
     (hzrplusminus i 1)) ι₁%abgrcat

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
DS3:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1))
DS4:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) DS3: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) DS3
DS5:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
  (C2 (i + 1 - 1)): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1)) (C2 (i + 1 - 1))
DS6:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5: BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1 - 1)) DS5
e2: maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1) =
maponpaths (λ i0 : hz, C1 (i0 + 1))
  (hzrplusminus i 1)
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) ι₁%abgrcat =
transportf
  (λ x' : A,
   A ⟦ x',
   to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1 - 1 + 1))
     (C2 (i + 1 - 1)) ⟧)
  (maponpaths C1 (hzrminusplus (i + 1) 1)) ι₁%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1 in
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2 (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i)
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
let DS1 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i) in
let DS2 := to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1 in
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2 (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i)
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2 (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor1 f i)
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (π₁%abgrcat
         · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (π₁%abgrcat
         · (to_inv (f i) · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))))
  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (π₁%abgrcat
         · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (π₁%abgrcat
         · (to_inv (f i) · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))))
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv (Diff C1 i)
         · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (π₂%abgrcat
      · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (π₁%abgrcat
         · (Diff C1 i · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (π₁%abgrcat
         · (to_inv (f i) · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))))
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
     (π₁%abgrcat
      · (to_inv (Diff C1 i)
         · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (π₂%abgrcat
      · (π₁%abgrcat · (ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))))

        (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat) · ι₂%abgrcat)
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS2 DS2
        (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat)
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat)))

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
     (to_binop DS2 DS2
        (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat

         · ι₂%abgrcat)))

π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

     (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
     (π₁%abgrcat · to_inv (Diff C1 i) · ι₁%abgrcat

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
     (to_inv (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat)
      · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
     (to_inv
        (π₁%abgrcat · Diff C1 i · ι₁%abgrcat
         · ι₂%abgrcat)))
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (ZeroArrow (Additive.to_Zero A) DS2 DS2)
  (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f)) =
ComplexHomotMorphism A (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f)

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f)) =
ComplexHomotMorphism A (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
∏ i : hz,
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f))
  i =
ComplexHomotMorphism A (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f))
  i =
ComplexHomotMorphism A (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f) i
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (identity
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i
      · MappingCylinderMor1_mor f i)) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (identity
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2_mor f i
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (identity
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i

C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))

        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))

           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1)
  (identity (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1))
  (to_inv
     (to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1) (C2 i)
        (π₁%abgrcat · f i) (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2 (identity DS2)
  (to_inv
     (to_binop DS2 (C2 i) (π₁%abgrcat · f i)
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat)
      · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2 (identity DS2)
  (to_inv
     (to_binop DS2 DS2
        (π₁%abgrcat · f i · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
         · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2 (identity DS2)
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (to_inv
        (π₁%abgrcat · f i · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (to_inv
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
         · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (to_binop DS2 DS2 (π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat)
     (π₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat))
  (to_binop DS2 DS2
     (to_inv
        (π₁%abgrcat · f i · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (to_inv
        (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat
         · (ι₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat)))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

i: hz

DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
π₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat =
π₂%abgrcat · identity DS1 · ι₂%abgrcat

           (to_inv
              (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
               · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1

     (π₂%abgrcat · π₁%abgrcat · ι₁%abgrcat

         · ι₂%abgrcat)

              (π₂%abgrcat · π₂%abgrcat · ι₂%abgrcat
               · ι₂%abgrcat))
           (to_inv
              (π₁%abgrcat · f i · ι₂%abgrcat
               · ι₂%abgrcat))))) =

     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,

        (hzrminusplus i 1))

      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms DS2)
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,

  (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_mor2 f i) =

      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))

  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)

      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1))) =
to_binop DS2 DS2
