i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1))) =
to_binop (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1)
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1)
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
i: hz
DS1:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i): BinDirectSum (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)
DS2:= to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i) DS1: BinDirectSum (C1 i) DS1
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i0 : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i0)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i0 + 1)) (C2 i0)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1))) =
to_binop
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
     (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrminusplus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f i
      · MappingCylinderDiff A f (i - 1)))
  (transportf
     (precategory_morphisms
        (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : pr1 hz,
         to_BinDirectSums A (C1 i)
           (to_BinDirectSums A (C1 (i + 1)) (C2 i)))
        (hzrplusminus i 1))
     (MappingCylinderDiff A f i
      · MappingCylinderIsoHomot f (i + 1)))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f) =
identity
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))) =
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A)
  (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f)

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot A
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f)) =
ComplexHomotMorphism A ?H

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot A
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
 exact (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
to_binop (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
  (identity
     (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f)))
  (to_inv
     (MappingCylinderMor2 f · MappingCylinderMor1 f)) =
ComplexHomotMorphism A (MappingCylinderIsoHomot f)
 exact (MappingCylinderIsoHomot_eq f).
  Qed.

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
iso (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))

  
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
iso (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)
  (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A C2,
ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f) ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
(λ f0 : ComplexHomot_Additive A
        ⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A C2,
        ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f) ⟧,
 is_iso f0) ?pr1

    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot_Additive A ⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A C2,
ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f) ⟧
 exact (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f)).
    
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
(λ f0 : ComplexHomot_Additive A
        ⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A C2,
        ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f) ⟧,
 is_iso f0)
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot_Additive A
⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f),
ComplexHomotFunctor A C2 ⟧
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f))
  ?g

      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
ComplexHomot_Additive A
⟦ ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f),
ComplexHomotFunctor A C2 ⟧
 exact (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f)).
      
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f))
  (# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f))
 
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f) =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f) =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))

        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f) =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A C2)
 exact (MappingCylinderIso_eq1 f).
        
A: CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
C1, C2: Complex A
f: ComplexPreCat_Additive A ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
# (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor2 f)
· # (ComplexHomotFunctor A) (MappingCylinderMor1 f) =
identity (ComplexHomotFunctor A (MappingCylinder A f))
 exact (MappingCylinderIso_eq2 f).
  Qed.

End mapping_cylinder_KA_iso.

Local Transparent hz isdecrelhzeq hzplus iscommringops ZeroArrow.
